mapper.sql: id, title, author, release_date, publisher_id, genre_id, isbn, create_at, update_at, version

b.id as b_id, b.title as b_title, b.author as b_author, b.release_date as b_release_date, b.publisher_id as b_publisher_id, b.publisher_name as b_publisher_name, b.genre_id as b_genre_id, b.genre_name as b_genre_name, b.isbn as b_isbn, b.update_at as b_update_at, b.version as b_version, bs.id as bs_id, bs.book_stock_store_id as bs_book_stock_store_id, s.store_name as bs_store_name, bs.book_stock_quantity as bs_book_stock_quantity
mapper.select:
select
from ( select b.id, b.title, b.author, b.release_date, b.publisher_id, p.publisher_name, b.genre_id, g.genre_name, b.isbn, b.update_at, b.version from book b inner join publisher p on b.publisher_id = p.id inner join book_genre g on b.genre_id = g.id where b.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} ) b left join book_stock bs on bs.book_stock_book_id = b.id left join store s on s.id = bs.book_stock_store_id order by b.id, bs.id

with paged_book as ( select b.id, b.title, b.author, b.release_date, b.publisher_id, p.publisher_name, b.genre_id, g.genre_name, b.isbn, b.update_at, b.version from book b inner join publisher p on b.publisher_id = p.id inner join book_genre g on b.genre_id = g.id where 1 = 1
and ( lower(b.title) like concat(lower(#{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%') or lower(b.author) like concat(lower(#{keyword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}), '%') )
and b.release_date between #{releaseDateFrom,jdbcType=DATE} and #{releaseDateTo,jdbcType=DATE}
order by b.id limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER} offset #{offset,jdbcType=BIGINT} ) select
from paged_book b left join book_stock bs on bs.book_stock_book_id = b.id left join store s on s.id = bs.book_stock_store_id order by b.id, bs.id

select
from book where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} for update nowait
mapper.insert: insert into book (title, author, release_date, publisher_id, genre_id, isbn, create_at, update_at, version) values ( #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releaseDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{publisherId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{genreId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isbn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{version,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
